title: PROWRAP | Professional Catering Kitchen Foil Roll | 300mm x 75m | Heavy Duty Aluminium Foil for Cooking, Baking, Roasting & Freezing | Food Grade & Recyclable | Single Roll
features: Heavy Duty 300mm x 75m Foil Roll Professional-grade aluminium foil in a large 75m roll – designed for high performance in busy kitchens, whether at home or in catering environments.

Multi-Use for Cooking, Baking & Roasting Ideal for baking, roasting, grilling and general food prep. Helps retain heat, lock in moisture and deliver even cooking across meats, vegetables and baked goods.
Tear-Resistant, Easy to Handle Strong, flexible and easy to dispense – resists tearing or breaking even when wrapping large or irregular items. Suitable for high-volume professional use.
Food Safe & Recyclable Material Made from food-grade aluminium – safe for direct contact with hot and cold foods. Fully recyclable, helping reduce kitchen waste in commercial and home settings.
Trusted by Chefs, Caterers & Meal Prep Teams Used in restaurants, takeaways, delis and home kitchens. A catering essential for wrapping, storing, lining and prepping with efficiency.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: baking, roasting, food storage, food wrapping, food insulation, food refrigeration
